message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "Sales Clerk" as SalesClerk

participant "<<Presentation>>\nOrderDeliveredUI" as UI
participant "<<Application>>\nOrderDeliveredController" as Controller
participant "<<Service>>\n: OrderDeliveredService" as Service
participant "<<Persistence>>\n: PersistenceContext" as Persistence
participant "<<Factory>>\nfactory : RepositoryFactory" as Factory
participant "<<Repository>>\norderRepository : Repository" as Repository
participant "<<Domain>>\norderList : List<Order>" as OrderList
participant "<<DTO>>\norderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as OrderDTOList
participant "<<DTO>>\n: OrderMapper" as OrderMapper
participant "<<DTO>>\norderDTO : OrderDTO" as OrderDTO
participant "<<DTO>>\nselectedOrderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as SelectedOrderDTOList
participant "<<Domain>>\norder : Order" as Order

note left of SalesClerk
The Sales Clerk initializes
the process of updating the status of the order
end note

SalesClerk -> UI : create
activate UI

UI -> Controller : create
activate Controller

Controller -> Persistence : repositories()
activate Persistence
Persistence -> Factory : create
activate Factory
Persistence --> Controller : factory
deactivate Persistence

Controller -> Factory : orderRepository()
activate Factory
Factory -> Repository : create
activate Repository
Factory --> Controller : orderRepository
deactivate Factory

deactivate Repository
deactivate Factory

deactivate Controller

SalesClerk -> UI : listAllDispatchedOrders()
activate UI

UI -> Controller : listAllDispatchedOrders()
activate Controller

Controller -> Repository : getAllDispatchedOrders()
activate Repository
Repository -> OrderList : create
activate OrderList
Repository --> Controller : orderList
deactivate Repository

Controller -> OrderDTOList : create
activate OrderDTOList

loop foreach()
    Controller -> OrderList : getNext()
    OrderList --> Controller : order
    Controller -> OrderMapper : toDTO(order)
    activate OrderMapper
    OrderMapper -> OrderDTO : create
    activate OrderDTO
    OrderMapper --> Controller : orderDTO
    deactivate OrderMapper
    Controller -> OrderDTOList : add(orderDTO)
end

deactivate OrderList

Controller --> UI : orderDTOList
deactivate Controller
deactivate OrderDTOList

UI --> SalesClerk : orderDTOList
deactivate UI

note left of SalesClerk
The System presents a list of Orders to the
Sales Clerk whose Status are "Preparation"
and asks the Sales Clerk to choose Orders
whose Status will be updated to "Delivered".
end note

note left of SalesClerk
The Sales Clerk selects the Orders whose
Status are to be updated.
end note

SalesClerk -> UI : updateStatus(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate UI

UI -> Controller : updateStatusAndPersist(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate Controller

loop foreach()
    Controller -> SelectedOrderDTOList : getNext()
    activate SelectedOrderDTOList
    SelectedOrderDTOList --> Controller : orderDTO
    deactivate SelectedOrderDTOList
    Controller -> OrderMapper : toOrder(orderDTO)
    activate OrderMapper
    OrderMapper --> Controller : order
    deactivate OrderMapper
    Controller -> Order : changeStatusToDelivered()
    activate Order
    deactivate Order
    Controller -> Repository : update(order)
    activate Repository
    deactivate Repository
end

deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
deactivate OrderDTO

note left of SalesClerk
The System updates the Status of the selected Orders
and informs the Sales Clerk of the operation success.
end note

@enduml
```
